trigger_email_summary: A fictional service provider charged for a router, but the router was not delivered and support has not provided delivery proof or a refund date.

timeline_events.summary: Synthetic router order paid but not delivered. Redaction warning: do not store real addresses, receipts, tracking numbers, or support tickets.
Demo user asked for delivery proof or refund.
Provider states the issue is under investigation without a delivery record or refund deadline.

extracted_deadlines.action_required: Request proof of delivery or refund confirmation.

evidence_matrix.why_it_matters: Needed to show whether the router was delivered.
Needed if delivery cannot be proven.

company_response_gaps: Investigation response does not address the paid-not-delivered issue
recommended_next_action: Send a follow-up asking for delivery proof within a defined timeframe or immediate refund confirmation.
draft_reply_outline: State that the router remains undelivered in the synthetic case.
Request delivery proof or refund confirmation.
Ask for a named resolution deadline in general terms.
Note that unresolved paid-not-delivered issue will be escalated.

telegram_card_preview.title: DP-SVC-001: Router paid not delivered
telegram_card_preview.body: High priority. Paid hardware not delivered; no proof/refund. Deadline 2026-07-20. Recommended: request delivery proof or refund deadline.

redaction_required.warning: Replace real receipts, addresses, tracking numbers, support tickets, names, and exact provider text with synthetic placeholders.
